summary: Care Advantage is a comprehensive health insurance plan offering higher sum insured at affordable premium with unique features like automatic recharge, all category rooms allowed, no sub-limits on treatments, and optional global coverage. Available with sum insured options from 25L to 600L.
coverage: In Patient & Day Care Treatment Expenses up to Sum Insured
Room Rent - All Category Rooms allowed
Ambulance Cover up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor Expenses up to Sum Insured
AYUSH treatment up to Sum Insured
Global coverage option available as add-on for planned treatment of diseases diagnosed in India
waiting_periods: Initial Wait Period: 30 Days except for treatment of injuries
room_rent: All Category Rooms allowed for domestic coverage
No limit on room rent for global coverage
claims_information: Automatic Recharge up to Sum Insured once in a policy year for related and unrelated illness
Global Coverage claim cannot be claimed from Recharge Amount & Accrued NCB/NCB Super
No Claim Bonus: 10% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free policy year with maximum increase up to 50% of Sum Insured
exclusions: Global coverage option not available for NRI/OCI/PIO/Foreign National
Not available for person planning or studying abroad
Not available for person working or planning to work outside India
Not available for employed with merchant navy
Not available for person on immigration visa
Optional benefits not applicable for treatments taken out of India

faqs.question: What are the sum insured options available under Care Advantage?
faqs.answer: Sum Insured options available are 25L/50L/100L/200L/300L/600L

faqs.question: What is the initial waiting period for Care Advantage?
faqs.answer: Initial Wait Period is 30 Days except for treatment of injuries

faqs.question: How long is the pre-hospitalisation coverage?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalisation coverage is for 60 days for domestic coverage

faqs.question: How long is the post-hospitalisation coverage?
faqs.answer: Post-hospitalisation coverage is for 180 days for domestic coverage

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for named ailments?
faqs.answer: Named Ailment Wait Period is 24 Months

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for pre-existing diseases?
faqs.answer: Pre-Existing Disease wait Period is 48 Months

faqs.question: Is there any limit on room rent?
faqs.answer: All Category Rooms are allowed with no specific limit mentioned for domestic coverage

faqs.question: Is there any limit on ICU charges?
faqs.answer: No, there is no limit on ICU charges

faqs.question: What is the No Claim Bonus benefit?
faqs.answer: 10% increase in Sum Insured per Policy Year in case of claim-free year with maximum increase up to 50% of Sum Insured

faqs.question: What is the Automatic Recharge benefit?
faqs.answer: Automatic Recharge up to Sum Insured once in a Policy Year for related and unrelated illness

faqs.question: What is the minimum entry age for individual coverage?
faqs.answer: Minimum Entry Age for Individual is 5 Years

faqs.question: What is the minimum entry age for floater coverage?
faqs.answer: Minimum Entry Age for Floater is 91 days with at least 1 person of 18 Years or above

faqs.question: What is the maximum entry age for children?
faqs.answer: Maximum Entry Age for Child is 24 Years

faqs.question: What is the maximum entry age for adults?
faqs.answer: There is no age limit for adults

faqs.question: What are the policy term options?
faqs.answer: Policy Term options are 1/2/3 Years

faqs.question: Is global coverage available?
faqs.answer: Yes, global coverage is available as an add-on for planned treatment of diseases diagnosed in India

faqs.question: What are the geographical coverage options for global coverage?
faqs.answer: Option to choose Worldwide or World Wide excluding USA & CANADA coverage

faqs.question: Can global coverage claims be made from recharge amount?
faqs.answer: No, Global Coverage claim cannot be claimed from Recharge Amount & Accrued NCB/NCB Super

faqs.question: Is unlimited e-consultation available?
faqs.answer: Yes, Unlimited E-Consultation from General Physician using Customer Mobile Application is available

faqs.question: What health services are provided?
faqs.answer: Health Portal with Doctor on chat, Healthy tips reminder, and Discount Connect for discounts on consultations and diagnostics at network providers

faqs.question: Is AYUSH treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, AYUSH treatment is covered up to Sum Insured

faqs.question: Is organ donor expense covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, Organ Donor Expenses are covered up to Sum Insured

faqs.question: What are the premium zones?
faqs.answer: Zone 1 - Delhi NCR, Surat Mathura, Aligarh; Zone 1A - Mumbai (incl. MMR), Telangana, Rest of Gujarat; Zone 2 - Pune, Nasik, Indore, Bangalore Urban; Zone 3 - Rest of India

faqs.question: Who is not eligible for global coverage?
faqs.answer: NRI/OCI/PIO/Foreign National/Person planning or studying abroad/person working or planning to work outside India/employed with merchant navy/person on immigration visa are not eligible

faqs.question: What is Care OPD coverage?
faqs.answer: Care OPD provides 4 Physical Consultations from General Physician per year with max Rs.500 reimbursement per consultation, and 4 consultations from 14 specified specialists per year with same reimbursement limit

faqs.question: Which specialists are covered under Care OPD?
faqs.answer: Pediatrician, Psychiatrist, Obstetrics and Gynecologist, Cardiologist, Homeopathic Physician, Neurologist, Dietician, Orthopedic Surgeon, Diabetologist, Nephrologist, Dermatologist, ENT Specialist, Pulmonologist, Gastroenterologist

faqs.question: Is day care treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, Day Care Treatment Expenses are covered up to Sum Insured

faqs.question: Are advanced technology methods covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, Coverage of Advanced Technology Methods is available

faqs.question: Is there any sub-limit on treatments?
faqs.answer: No, there is no sub-limit on any treatment

faqs.question: What is the pre-hospitalization coverage period for global coverage?
faqs.answer: For global coverage, pre-hospitalization is covered for 30 days (25L/50L/100L) or 60 days (200L/300L/600L)

faqs.question: What is the post-hospitalization coverage period for global coverage?
faqs.answer: For global coverage, post-hospitalization is covered for 60 days (25L/50L/100L) or 120 days (200L/300L/600L)

faqs.question: Is air ambulance covered under global coverage?
faqs.answer: Air ambulance is covered up to Sum Insured for higher sum insured plans (200L/300L/600L) but not available for lower plans (25L/50L/100L)

faqs.question: What is repatriation of mortal remains coverage?
faqs.answer: Repatriation of Mortal Remains is covered up to 5 Lakh for higher sum insured plans (200L/300L/600L) under global coverage

faqs.question: What is compassionate visit coverage?
faqs.answer: Compassionate visit is covered up to Sum Insured with minimum hospitalization requirement of 5 days for higher sum insured plans (200L/300L/600L)
